target: Plan: Eval Infrastructure Hardening (intugest benchmark insights)

spikes.trigger: locomo_api_benchmark.py is sibling of locomo_llm_judge.py with identical dataset. Plan adds 6 metrics to judge.py but zero to api_benchmark.py.
spikes.action: Extract shared eval_metrics.py or deprecate api_benchmark.py

spikes.trigger: LOCOMO memories stored via /api/remember bypass hook-based temporal fact extraction. /api/facts/temporal will return empty for benchmark memories.
spikes.action: Add explicit fact extraction call or check valid_until on Memory objects in recall response

spikes.trigger: E6 cross-references 'GET /api/memory/{id}/feedback' — endpoint does not exist. Only POST /api/reinforce (write-only) exists.
spikes.action: Drop cross-reference from E6 or add feedback query endpoint to Rust handlers

spikes.trigger: Triple-weak: error coverage + contract coverage + integration fragility. Plan designs from conceptual level without verifying API plumbing.
spikes.action: Add Phase 0.5: API availability verification before implementation

interrupts.anomaly: E4 (Freshness-Stratified Recall) structurally void on LOCOMO dataset
interrupts.trigger: All 20 memories created in 28-day window. Every memory falls in Band B (7-30d). Stratification produces: Band A=0, Band B=20, Band C=0, Band D=0.
interrupts.impact: E4 would report single-band MRR with zero diagnostic value
interrupts.fix: Use LongMemEval data (multi-session, wider temporal spread) OR create dedicated freshness-test dataset

interrupts.anomaly: E1 temporal facts won't exist for benchmark memories
interrupts.trigger: Temporal fact extraction is hook-triggered (PostToolUse), not API-triggered. Direct /api/remember calls bypass hooks.
interrupts.impact: Contradiction@K produces all-zero results — false assurance of no contamination
interrupts.fix: Add POST /api/facts/extract call after store_memory(), or check valid_until on Memory objects in recall response

interrupts.trigger: POST /api/reinforce is write-only. No GET endpoint to query per-memory feedback history.
interrupts.impact: E6 cross-reference design is impossible without Rust handler changes
interrupts.fix: Drop cross-reference or add GET /api/memory/{id}/feedback handler

interrupts.anomaly: E5 partially redundant with existing judge rubric
interrupts.trigger: Existing judge uses 0-3 rubric where 3=fully answerable — already an answerability metric
interrupts.impact: New answerable@K metric duplicates existing signal unless separated into 2 passes
interrupts.fix: Split judge into evidence sufficiency pass (can you answer?) + correctness pass (is the answer right?)

interrupts.anomaly: Version bump inappropriate for eval-only changes
interrupts.trigger: Python benchmark scripts not in Cargo.toml build. Bumping Rust version for Python changes is misleading.
interrupts.fix: Skip Cargo.toml version bump for eval-only work

a_star_priority.why: Two broken APIs = silent false negatives in E1 and E6
Hook-based pipeline bypassed by direct API calls
All memories in Band B — structurally uninformative

improvement_surfaces.issue: E4 structurally void on LOCOMO dataset (all Band B)
improvement_surfaces.action: Redesign: use LongMemEval OR create freshness-specific dataset with controlled age distribution

improvement_surfaces.issue: E1 temporal facts won't exist for benchmark memories
improvement_surfaces.action: Add explicit fact extraction call OR check valid_until on Memory objects in recall response
Drop cross-reference OR add GET feedback endpoint to Rust handlers

improvement_surfaces.issue: E5 partially redundant with existing judge rubric
improvement_surfaces.action: Split judge into 2 passes: evidence sufficiency + answer correctness
Extract shared eval_metrics.py, import in both benchmark files

improvement_surfaces.issue: Version bump inappropriate for eval-only changes
improvement_surfaces.action: Skip Cargo.toml bump for eval-only work

learning_candidates.observation: Benchmark scripts bypass hook-based pipelines — temporal fact extraction, feedback tracking, and proactive context don't fire
learning_candidates.applicable_to: any future benchmark that stores memories via direct API calls

learning_candidates.observation: LOCOMO's 28-day memory window makes freshness stratification uninformative — need controlled age distribution for temporal metrics
learning_candidates.applicable_to: any eval metric that depends on temporal spread

learning_candidates.observation: Plan designed from conceptual level (what SHOULD be measured) without verifying plumbing level (what CAN be measured) — need API availability check phase

required_revisions: Add Phase 0.5: API plumbing verification (store test memory, check temporal facts, check feedback query)
Redesign E4: use LongMemEval or synthetic dataset with controlled age spread across all 4 bands
Fix E1: add explicit fact extraction call after store_memory(), or use valid_until from Memory objects
Fix E6: drop Hebbian cross-reference (no query endpoint) — LLM-judge-only misleading detection
Fix E5: split into 2-pass judge (evidence sufficiency + answer correctness) to differentiate from existing rubric
